response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the first song as 'Dry Flower' by Yuuri from on-screen text. 2. Performed a search for lyrics and confirmed the original artist. 3. Identified the second song as 'Ninin Sankyaku' from on-screen text, performed by Tokoyami Towa and Nekota Tsuna. 4. Since the song is an original track, the lyrics were transcribed from the on-screen display during the performance.
response.global_summary: A musical performance video featuring two songs. The first song is a cover of 'Dry Flower' by Yuuri, performed by Tokoyami Towa. The second is an original song titled 'Ninin Sankyaku' performed as a duet by Tokoyami Towa and Nekota Tsuna.

scenes.description: Tokoyami Towa performs a cover of 'Dry Flower'. The stage is lit with purple lights, and the audience holds penlights.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
多分、私じゃなくていいね
余裕のない二人だったし
気付けば喧嘩ばっかりしてさ
ずっと話そうと思ってた
きっと私たち合わないね
二人きりしかいない部屋でさ
貴方ばかり話していたよね
もし何処かで会えたら
今日の事を笑ってくれるかな
理由もちゃんと話せないけれど
貴方が眠った後に泣くのは嫌
声も顔も不器用なとこも
全部全部
嫌いじゃないの
ドライフラワーみたい
君との日々も
きっときっときっときっと
色褪せる
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Maybe, it's fine that it wasn't me.
We were a couple without any leeway,
And before I knew it, we were always fighting.
I'd been meaning to talk about this for a long time,
Surely we just weren't meant to be.
In a room with only the two of us,
You were the only one talking, weren't you?
If we ever meet somewhere again,
I wonder if you'll be able to laugh about today.
I can't properly explain the reason, but
I hate that I cry after you've fallen asleep.
Your voice, your face, and your awkwardness,
I don't hate any of it, none of it.
Like a dry flower,
My days with you too,
Surely, surely, surely, surely,
Will fade away.

scenes.description: Tokoyami Towa and Nekota Tsuna perform the original song 'Ninin Sankyaku' together. The stage features dynamic lighting and screens showing lyrics and anime-style art.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
眠れなくて、だから一緒に
いつも輝いていたい
あなたにいつも感謝
転んでも立ち上がる
夢を叶えたいんだ
どんなに壁にぶつかっても
仲間がいるから
もう一人じゃないから
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
(We) couldn't sleep because of it, so let's go out together.
Always wishing to shine, 
That's why I'm always grateful to you.
Even if we fall down, we'll stand up again.
I want to make our dreams come true.
No matter how much we hit a wall,
Because we have each other,
I'm not alone anymore.
